final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade infographic plate for Chinese minority ethnic costume, designed for national museum exhibition panels with scholarly precision and collectible gravitas.

Style/medium: museum exhibition plate in the restrained elegance of national museum textile archives, printed on aged silk-paper stock with the quiet authority of scholarly documentation
Composition: fixed five-zone layout — top header band, left structural dissection zone with callout lines, upper-right material/texture sample grid, middle-right pattern/color symbolism panel, bottom wearing-sequence flowchart with core characteristics summary; central figure in full standing pose when human-appropriate, or central exploded diagram when object-focused
Subject: Miao silver-ornamented festival costume (苗族盛装) — complete ensemble with pleated indigo skirt, embroidered jacket, layered silver neck rings, headdress with phoenix motifs, and belt with suspended accessories; structural callouts for: 百褶裙 (pleated skirt), 绣花上衣 (embroidered jacket), 银项圈 (silver neck rings), 银头饰 (silver headdress), 腰带及吊饰 (belt with pendants), 绑腿 (leg wraps)
Scene/backdrop: warm rice-paper ground in pale ivory and light tea tones, the texture of well-kept museum storage
Lighting/mood: even archival illumination that reveals weave and metalwork without theatrical drama, the respectful stillness of objects that carry generations
Color palette: indigo as the soul of the cloth, silver as moonlight on mountain paths, embroidery reds and greens as living memory against the warm neutrality of aged paper
Materials/textures: hand-woven indigo cotton with visible weave structure, hammered silver with subtle tool marks, silk embroidery threads with dimensional satin stitch, wax-resist patterns showing the crackle of tradition
Text (verbatim): 
主标题：苗族盛装——穿在身上的史诗
副标题：黔东南苗族服饰结构与文化图鉴
导语：苗族盛装是苗族妇女一生技艺的集大成者，每一件都是行走的无字史书，记录着族群迁徙、图腾崇拜与审美理想。
结构标注：百褶裙·三十道褶象征三十个支系；绣花上衣·肩部龙纹寓意祖先庇护；银项圈·九层同心圆代表九天之上；银头饰·凤鸟造型呼应民族起源传说；腰带吊饰·银铃与响铃随步生韵
材质说明：手工织染土布·蓝靛草反复浸染三十次；捶纹银饰·一锤一锤打出的月亮光泽；蚕丝绣线·养蚕抽丝自染自绣
纹样色彩：主色板——靛蓝（土地与永恒）、银白（月亮与纯洁）、朱红（生命与喜庆）、翠绿（山林与生机）；纹样——涡旋纹（水与迁徙）、龙纹（祖先与力量）、凤纹（女性与繁衍）、几何纹（山川与家园）
穿着流程：内裙→绑腿→百褶裙→绣花上衣→银项圈→头饰→腰带→完成
核心特征：无文字民族的历史档案·母女传承的技艺体系·银饰重量的身份标识·刺绣针法的支系密码
Constraints: all text in Simplified Chinese, clear and legible at reading distance, no garbled characters or pinyin; structural accuracy of costume components; realistic material representation; fixed five-zone layout maintained
Avoid: poster sensibility, studio photography aesthetic, e-commerce product page styling, anime or illustration rendering, cosplay energy, mislabeled parts, illegible text, fake material textures, excessive decorative flourishes
